task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the scenario directory and environment configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal or text editor showing a scenario file (e.g., .ini) in '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Channel Convoy Escort/'. The file must contain environment settings for 'English Channel East', time set to 05:30 on Nov 15 2024, sea state <= 3.0, and visibility >= 8.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration of the ownship (HMS Sentinel).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ownship definition in the scenario file named 'HMS Sentinel' (Frigate) with a heading of 045 and speed of 10 knots. Its starting position should be calculated as 3nm from the center (50.80N, 0.50E) on a bearing of 315 degrees.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration of the three-ship Merchant Column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three merchant vessels defined in the scenario file. They must all have a heading of 045 and speed of 10 knots. Their positions should reflect a 1nm spacing: Guide at exactly 50.80N, 0.50E, Lead 1nm ahead, and Rear 1nm astern.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration of the two-ship Escort Screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'HMS Guardian' and 'HMS Defender' defined in the scenario file. Both must have a heading of 045 and speed of 10 knots. Their positions should reflect being 3nm ahead of the center and 3nm on the starboard beam, respectively.

task_completion.description: Verify that all vessels have a waypoint leg configured for the course change.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for waypoint configurations for the vessels in the scenario file showing a turn to course 090 degrees at longitude 1.00E.

task_completion.description: Verify the global Bridge Command configuration updates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat) of '/home/ga/.config/Bridge Command/bc5.ini' showing the exact lines: arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, max_radar_range=72, and radar_range_resolution=256.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the convoy escort briefing document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text file at '/home/ga/Documents/convoy_escort_brief.txt' containing written details about the formation, communications plan, and threat response.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually created and edited the files in the specified directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check file paths in text editor title bars, terminal prompts, or 'ls'/'cat' commands to confirm the files exist in the exact requested locations (/opt/bridgecommand/..., /home/ga/.config/..., /home/ga/Documents/...) rather than temporary or incorrect directories.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent performed calculations for the ship offsets rather than hallucinating coordinates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of mathematical calculations (e.g., a Python script, calculator usage, or terminal output) used to determine the exact latitude and longitude for the 1nm and 3nm offsets from the 50.80N, 0.50E center.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just print a success message without actually writing the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the actual contents of the .ini files and the .txt briefing document are visible in the screenshots, not just a terminal command claiming they were created.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The convoy center is exactly at 50.80N, 0.50E in the English Channel East. All 6 vessels must have a base course of 045 degrees and a speed of 10.0 knots. The turn waypoint is at Longitude 1.00E, turning to Course 090. Ownship (HMS Sentinel) is positioned 3.0nm away on a 315-degree bearing from the center. The Merchant Column has 1.0nm spacing (Lead 1nm ahead, Guide at center, Rear 1nm astern). The Escort Screen has a 3.0nm radius (HMS Guardian 3nm ahead, HMS Defender 3nm on starboard beam). HMS Defender (D36) is a real active Daring-class destroyer. The ARPA radar configuration settings (arpa_on=1, full_radar=1) are valid Bridge Command parameters.
